title: Review bead introspection CLI ergonomics implementation
description: Review all changes for spec spec-df49daa7 across parser.py, formatting.py, bead.py (history handler, show --field, list filters), tests/test_cli_bead.py, and CLAUDE.md. Verify: correctness of dotted-path + bracket-index resolution including negative indices; type-dispatch rendering rules match the spec table exactly (bare string, str(n), lowercase bool, empty line for null/empty-string, pretty JSON for list/dict); --status/--agent/--feature-root AND semantics and per-flag OR semantics; error exit codes and stderr message format match spec ('field not found: <path>' and 'field not found: <path> (length N)'); backwards compatibility when no new flags are passed; all 21 test cases from the spec Test Plan are covered; all 12 acceptance criteria are satisfied.
acceptance_criteria: All 12 acceptance criteria from spec spec-df49daa7 are met
No regressions in existing takt bead list, show, or other subcommands
Error messages match the exact format specified in the spec
Path resolution handles dotted paths, bracket indexing, and negative indices correctly
All 21 test cases from the spec Test Plan are covered in tests/test_cli_bead.py
